items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah, extends greetings on the occasion of Ugadi, Gudi Padwa, Navreh, Sajibu Cheiraoba and Cheti Chand
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah, extends greetings on the occasion of Ugadi, Gudi Padwa, Navreh, Sajibu Cheiraoba and Cheti Chand May Ugadi festival, which welcomes the new year, bring joy, unity, and prosperity to everyone's lives May Gudi Padwa, a symbol of victory, prosperity, and auspiciousness, bring new energy and bo…

items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings on the occasion of Chaitra Navratri
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings on the occasion of Chaitra Navratri Heartfelt greetings to all countrymen on the sacred festival of Chaitra Navratri I pray to Maa Bhagwati for everyone’s good health, prosperity, and a life full of splendor Posted On: 19 MAR 2026 11:15AM by PIB Delhi Union Home Minister and…

items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings on the occasion of Hindu New Year 2026 'Vikram Samvat 2083'
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings on the occasion of Hindu New Year 2026 'Vikram Samvat 2083' Heartfelt greetings to all fellow citizens on the occasion of Nav Samvatsar ‘Vikram Samvat 2083’ May God infuse new energy, renewed consciousness, and prosperity into everyone's life in this New Year Posted On: 19 M…

items.title: 22nd Instalment of PM-KISAN
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau PIB Headquarters 22nd Instalment of PM-KISAN Posted On: 19 MAR 2026 11:18AM by PIB Delhi Key Takeaways The Prime Minister released over ₹18,640 crore as the 22 nd instalment of the Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN) scheme from Guwahati, Assam , on March 13, 2026. Over 9.32 crore farmers have received financial assistance under this instalment. 2.15 crore of these are …
